items.caption: A well-lit grocery store's cooler aisle, bathed in a soft glow from the overhead fluorescent lights. the aisle is neatly divided into two sections by a central divider, each section housing a row of refrigerated display cases. these cases, painted in a clean white, are filled with an array of frozen foods, their labels clearly visible. the aisle is marked by signs indicating the type of products available, guiding shoppers to their desired items. the floor beneath is a pristine white, reflecting the light and enhancing the overall brightness of the space. the relative positions of the objects suggest an organized and efficient layout, designed for easy navigation and convenience.
